transcript.text:
Hello everyone
For today's mukbang,
I bought de-boned short ribs from Costco
2.9kg
It costs 66,000 Won (~$60 USD)
I'll carefully butcher it
It's boneless short ribs from chuck
I wiped the blood
I thought it was 1 chunk
But it's 2
It's 2 chunks mukbang now
I won't be able to eat that much if I cut out all the fat
It just rips off
Nevermind
There's so much fat
Look at all of this

Steak membrane
Membrane~ It's out now
This should be fine, right?
This looks good?
I have 1 more, I'm sorry
I love the red meat reveal
This is it
Can you guys see?
This part is the delicious part
This part is like okay
This is the sirloin, so it's a bit dry
And this connects to the short ribs, so it's really delicious
I feel like I'm doing a butchering stream
All done
Let's eat now
I'm exhausted

I'm not going to salt it
Will it fit on this grill?
Let's put the extra virgin oil
It's heavy
Let's get some garlic in here
Let's try this first
It's not the good part of the meat, but still
It's a bit chewy but still good
It won't get burnt
I have to cook it for a long time I have no choice
It's too thick It will be even chewier if It's raw
Let's try it
A thin slice
That's so good
It's ready
Very nice

Look at the thickness
It's really good
Seasoning and aging this like a steak would be really tasty too
This one is like medium well-done
The inside is chewy
Was that too much? Whatever
More the merrier
Some parts are tender and some parts are chewy
Chewy doesn't mean that it's not good
I like it cooked like this
This is just about right for me
Yummy
The barbeque sauce is tasty
The grease splashed onto my finger and it's super hot
This one has some fat on it
It's too hot

This tastes different from the 1++ grade
The price would be over 10 times if I wanted to buy this much meat of 1++ grade
This one is too well-done
A bit rare is delicious
Let's butcher up the other chunk into pieces before grilling
The pieces are pretty big
I cut them into big pieces
Since the meat is so big
I can taste the different parts
I'm eating various parts of the cow
I bought this grill from eMart
Suntouch Wide Grill
I will clean it
Careful careful
Let's eat some garlic
Spicy

Tasty
Medical K-drama?
Scalpel
That cuts through so easily
The marbling is not that great
I bought the wrong one
Such a waste
You have to cut the meat against the grain
All done
I'll cook them now
These are from the tasty part of the chunk
Sirloin now
This one's from the middle
This is the tasty one
Out of what we have
That's so good

It's different than before
This way is so much better
Very good
These are tough to chew
Let's cook the rest
Let's cook and get rid of the sirloin first
Very tasty
Why is it so good?
I think the more you cook the sirloin, the better it gets
These parts are so good
There's a huge difference
That's it? That was barely any food
I have to eat Ramyun noodles again?
That piece was amazing
It's cooked so well
It wasn't that much food The mukbang took long because I had to chew a lot

I don't feel full at all
Thanks everyone~
Let's eat the Bibimmyeon (Cold Spicy Noodles)
2 of these are like 1 Ramyun noodles, no?
2 packs are like 1 This is so small
This is perfect for a late-night snack
Have I finished it already? I wasn't eating that fast
I was saving it
